camp_spots.name: Moab Dispersed Camping Area
camp_spots.description: Beautiful red rock formations with incredible sunrise and sunset views. Popular spot for van lifers with easy access to Arches and Canyonlands.

camp_spots.name: Alabama Hills - Lone Pine
camp_spots.description: Iconic camping spot with incredible mountain views and unique rock formations. Free camping with amazing photography opportunities.

camp_spots.name: Secret Spot - Sedona Area
camp_spots.description: Hidden gem with red rock views and peaceful surroundings. Members-only location with limited access to preserve the area.

driveway_hosts.name: Phoenix Driveway - Power & Water
driveway_hosts.description: Friendly host offering driveway parking with electrical hookup and water access. Great base for exploring Phoenix area.

businesses.name: Outside Van - Mercedes Sprinter Specialists
businesses.description: Professional van conversion and repair services specializing in Mercedes Sprinter vans. Full service shop with van life expertise.

events.name: Quartzsite Van Life Gathering 2025
events.description: Annual van life meetup in Quartzsite with workshops, vendor booths, and community activities. The largest van life gathering in the southwest.
